name: atomicity: existing target file is unchanged when the new write fails partway
command: echo 'PRE-EXISTING' > out.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-output "$PWD/out.yaml" --simulate-fail-after-bytes 50 2>/dev/null && grep -E '^PRE-EXISTING$' out.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && for i in $(seq 1 10); do printf 'source:
  id: src-%d
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' "$i" > tree/a${i}.yaml; done
